rule: Scores are generated from source ledgers and generated hop graph. Do not edit this file by hand.
machine_score_note: machine_score is normalized 0..1 relative to the most structurally embedded entity. laundering_chain_score and surface_type_recurrence are independent of the Clifford Number: an entity can have a high chain/machine score and no hop (clifford_number null). That is structural position, not guilt by association.

organizations.label: Faculty / Faculty Science / ASI Data Science
Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT)
AI Security Institute / AI Safety Institute

chains.chain_label: Policy creation → procurement corridor → personnel continuity → commercial deployment

stages.note: Clifford authors the commissioned AI Opportunities Action Plan; government accepts and operationalizes it.

stages.surface_label: Detachment 201 Executive Innovation Corps commissioning surface, 2025
stages.note: Detachment 201 commissions senior technology-company executives (Palantir, OpenAI) as Army Reserve officers, occupying the strategic/procurement corridor. Award IDs/amounts not yet confirmed; reported/structural.

stages.surface_label: No. 10 Chief Adviser on Digital and Data surface, 2019-2021
stages.note: The synthetic-population / modelled-input logic is built inside No. 10 government machinery, then carried by the same personnel into the private sector.

stages.surface_label: Electric Twin / News UK synthetic audience surface
stages.note: The same logic is commercialized as synthetic-audience infrastructure and deployed at a named customer (News UK), substituting modelled feedback for real consultation.

chains.why_no_hop: No bounded surface carries shared Matt Clifford co-participation across these stages. The stages are connected by policy lineage and a procurement corridor, not by co-presence. Clifford Numbers for the actors involved are therefore unchanged by this chain. The chain expresses structural position only and must never be read as a hop or as guilt by association.
